title: Build Capability Reference
description: Reference to a creative agent's build_creative capability. Used on products where the creative must be produced via a specific creative agent (e.g., podcast host-read products where the publisher's host records the audio from a script). Buyers resolve the capability by calling `get_adcp_capabilities` on the agent and reading its `creative_build_capabilities` array, then call `build_creative` against the matching capability.

agent_url.description: URL of the creative agent that exposes the capability.

capability_id.description: Identifier of the specific build capability within the agent (e.g., 'the_daily_host_read_production').

digest.description: Optional SHA-256 content digest of the capability definition. Lets buyers detect when the capability has changed.
